What I Offer

Simple, transparent service from start to finish

🔍

Diagnostics

I'll find out exactly what's wrong and tell you what needs to be fixed — before anything moves forward.

🔧

Repairs & Fixes

Fan noise, RGB issues, BIOS problems, driver errors, OS installs, virus removal, hardware swaps — flat rate, no surprises.

🖥️

Custom Builds

I send you a parts list with direct links. You order everything yourself, bring it to me, and I handle full assembly, cable management, and OS install.

💾

Data & Storage

Data recovery, drive migrations, and file transfers. I'll get your data where it needs to be.

⚡

Setup & Config

Peripherals, RGB sync, software setup, performance tuning — everything dialed in so you can sit down and game.

🏠

In-Home Service

Can't bring it to me? I'll come to you anywhere in San Antonio. Same flat repair rate applies.

Service Pricing

Flat rates. No hidden fees. You always keep full control of your parts.

🔍 Diagnostics
Diagnostic / Problem Assessment
I'll find out exactly what's wrong and tell you what needs fixing. Fee applies whether or not you move forward. If a part is needed, I'll tell you exactly what to order — you buy it, bring it back, and I'll handle the rest.
$50
🔧 Repairs & Fixes
General Repair / Troubleshooting
Fan issues, RGB hookup, BIOS fixes, driver errors, general diagnostics.
$50
OS Install / Reinstall
Fresh Windows install with drivers and basic setup included.
$50
Virus / Malware Removal
Full system clean and security setup so it doesn't happen again.
$50
Hardware Swap
GPU, RAM, CPU cooler, SSD swaps — labor only. You supply the part.
$50
🖥️ Builds
Full Custom PC Build
I send you a parts list with direct links. You order everything, bring it to me, and I do full assembly, cable management, POST, and OS install. You keep full control of your money.
$100
PC Cleanup & Optimization
Deep clean, thermal repaste, cable management, and performance tune.
$50
💾 Data & Storage
Data Recovery
File recovery from failing or dead drives. Diagnosed first — results not guaranteed but I'll give it everything.
$75
Data Transfer / Migration
Move your files, games, or OS from an old drive to a new one.
$50
⚡ Setup & Other
PC Setup / Peripheral Config
Monitor, peripherals, RGB sync, and software setup from scratch.
$50
In-Home Service
I come to you anywhere in the San Antonio area. Flat repair rate still applies.
$50 + $20 travel
Consultation / Quote
Tell me what you need — I'll figure out the best build or fix for your budget. No pressure.
FREE

💰 Flat Rate Pricing

Most repairs are $50. Full custom builds are $100. No hidden fees — what you see on the pricing page is what you pay.

📋 How It Works (Builds)

1) Hit me up for a free quote → 2) I send you a parts list with links → 3) You order everything yourself → 4) Bring parts to me → 5) Pay $100 labor at pickup → 6) Enjoy!

🔒 You Stay In Control

You order your own parts directly from retailers — your money never goes through me. You keep full control. I just handle the build. Labor collected at pickup in San Antonio, TX.
